title: Supreme Court dismisses plea against Bombay HC proposal to appoint administrators for Lilavati Trust
description: The Supreme Court on Monday dismissed a plea challenging a Bombay High Court order proposing appointment of a committee of administrators to oversee the functioning of Lilavati Hospital Trust.A Bench of Justices MM Sundresh and N Kotiswar Singh noted that Bombay High Court’s observations in this regard were only prima facie and that no final decision had been taken to appoint the administrators. The Bench noted that the High Court merely asked parties to respond to the proposal. It clarified tha
